studios.name: Modern Office
studios.description: Премиальная фотосессия в современном офисе: мягкий дневной свет, скульптурные стены, lounge-зона, рабочий стол и чистая архитектура для личного бренда.
studios.base_prompt: inside a premium modern office interior with cream sculptural walls, soft integrated wavy wall lighting, light oak herringbone floor, tall sheer curtains, rounded taupe lounge furniture, minimalist executive desk, potted greenery, calm high-end workspace atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: modern office wardrobe: tailored blazer, dress shirt, smart business casual or elegant suit, polished professional styling, no evening gown, no sportswear

studios.name: Premium Gym
studios.description: Премиальный спортзал для динамичной фотосессии: стильная фитнес-зона, зеркала, тренажёры, мягкий свет и уверенная спортивная атмосфера.
studios.base_prompt: inside a premium modern gym interior with matte black equipment, warm wood wall panels, large mirrors, rubber training floor, linear ceiling lights, plants, open functional training zones, clean high-end fitness club atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: stylish premium athletic wardrobe: fashionable fitted sportswear, technical top, joggers, leggings or clean training shorts, modern sneakers, polished fully clothed fitness styling that matches a luxury gym

studios.name: Boutique Hotel
studios.description: Элегантный интерьер boutique hotel: мрамор, мягкие кресла, латунные детали, бархат и дорогой приглушённый свет.
studios.base_prompt: inside a refined boutique hotel lobby and suite interior with marble surfaces, warm brass details, velvet lounge chairs, tall curtains, curated art, soft cinematic hotel lighting, luxury hospitality atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: boutique hotel wardrobe: elegant evening or cocktail smart outfit, refined fabric, polished premium styling, suitable for upscale hotel lobby, not office formal

studios.name: Castle Library
studios.description: Атмосферная библиотека замка: камень, дерево, высокие окна, книжные стены и благородный классический свет.
studios.base_prompt: inside an elegant castle library with stone arches, dark carved wood shelves, tall leaded windows, antique reading tables, leather chairs, warm candle-like ambient light, cinematic heritage atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: castle library wardrobe: classic elegant outfit, tailored coat or refined dress shirt, heritage-inspired formal styling, muted rich fabrics

studios.name: Hi-Tech Lab
studios.description: Футуристичный hi-tech интерьер: стекло, световые панели, чистые линии и технологичный premium look.
studios.base_prompt: inside a premium futuristic hi-tech lab and innovation office with glass walls, clean white panels, soft blue-white light strips, matte metal details, transparent screens without readable text, sleek technology atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: hi-tech wardrobe: sleek smart casual, modern jacket, clean technical fabrics, monochrome or cool neutral colors, innovation-leader styling

studios.name: Urban Loft
studios.description: Городской loft с кирпичом, бетоном, большими окнами и editorial-настроением для более смелых кадров.
studios.base_prompt: inside a stylish urban loft studio with exposed brick, polished concrete, black steel window frames, warm industrial pendant lights, leather chair, large city windows, editorial creative atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: urban loft wardrobe: creative editorial smart casual, leather jacket or relaxed blazer, dark denim or structured casual pieces, stylish city look

studios.name: Luxury Penthouse
studios.description: Пентхаус с панорамным видом, дорогими материалами, мягкой мебелью и статусной спокойной эстетикой.
studios.base_prompt: inside a luxury penthouse with panoramic city windows, warm stone, designer furniture, low sculptural sofa, elegant side tables, soft daylight, high-end private residence atmosphere without bedroom feeling
studios.wardrobe_prompt: luxury penthouse wardrobe: elegant premium lifestyle outfit, refined evening-casual styling, soft luxury fabrics, upscale private-event look

studios.name: Art Gallery
studios.description: Современная галерея: белые стены, большие полотна, архитектурный свет и чистое пространство для editorial-портретов.
studios.base_prompt: inside a contemporary art gallery with white walls, large abstract paintings without readable text, polished concrete floor, museum track lighting, open negative space, refined editorial atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: art gallery wardrobe: creative sophisticated outfit, minimal black or architectural clothing, gallery-opening style, refined but artistic

studios.name: Wellness Spa
studios.description: Спокойный wellness-интерьер: камень, дерево, мягкий свет, растения и clean premium lifestyle-настроение.
studios.base_prompt: inside a premium wellness spa lounge with natural stone, warm wood, soft linen textures, indoor plants, diffused daylight, calm minimalist luxury atmosphere, fully clothed lifestyle portrait setting
studios.wardrobe_prompt: wellness wardrobe: calm premium lifestyle outfit, soft knitwear or linen, fully clothed relaxed styling, natural neutral colors, elegant spa lounge look

studios.name: Executive Boardroom
studios.description: Современная переговорная и boardroom для строгих деловых портретов, презентаций и командного leadership-образа.
studios.base_prompt: inside a premium executive boardroom with long matte conference table, leather chairs, large glass wall, warm wood panels, subtle city view, presentation screen with abstract unbranded graphics, polished corporate atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: executive boardroom wardrobe: formal business suit, crisp shirt, executive professional styling, polished corporate look

studios.name: Яхта / марина
studios.description: Съёмка на яхте и в марине: белая палуба, море, солнечные блики, канаты, лаунж-зона и спокойный premium resort-образ.
studios.base_prompt: on a luxury yacht and marina setting with white deck, polished chrome rails, calm sea, marina docks, soft sunlight, nautical ropes, outdoor lounge seating, premium resort lifestyle atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: yacht marina wardrobe: elegant resort smart casual, linen shirt, light trousers, nautical blazer or refined summer dress, expensive relaxed styling, no swimwear

studios.name: Пляж / beach club
studios.description: Beach club у моря: светлый песок, шезлонги, зонты, мягкий дневной свет и расслабленная курортная эстетика.
studios.base_prompt: at an elegant beach club with pale sand, cream umbrellas, designer sunbeds, cabanas, ocean horizon, warm daylight, natural coastal textures, upscale summer lifestyle atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: beach club wardrobe: location-appropriate beachwear and resortwear only: linen beach shirt, relaxed resort shorts or linen trousers, light sundress, kaftan, pareo cover-up, sandals, straw hat or sunglasses. No blazer, no suit, no formal jacket, no office shirt, no business shoes, no corporate look. Keep it tasteful, non-revealing, beach-appropriate and fully styled for a premium beach club.

studios.name: Улицы мегаполиса
studios.description: Большой город: стеклянные фасады, переходы, отражения, движение улицы и современный editorial street-style.
studios.base_prompt: on modern metropolis streets with glass high-rise buildings, crosswalks, reflections, clean sidewalks, urban depth, soft city light, premium editorial street photography atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: metropolis street wardrobe: stylish city editorial outfit, trench coat, tailored jacket, denim or structured casual pieces, fashionable urban styling

studios.name: Дюны и барханы
studios.description: Пустынные дюны: песчаные линии, мягкий закатный свет, ветер, минимализм и кинематографичная fashion-серия.
studios.base_prompt: among desert dunes and sand ridges with soft golden hour light, wind-shaped lines, open horizon, minimal cinematic landscape, luxury editorial fashion atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: desert dunes wardrobe: elegant desert editorial look, flowing linen, structured safari jacket, neutral fabrics, scarf or coat movement, fully clothed fashion styling

studios.name: Автогараж / luxury garage
studios.description: Luxury garage с дорогими авто: бетон, тёплый свет, глянец кузова, leather-акценты и уверенный city luxury.
studios.base_prompt: inside a luxury car garage with premium sports cars, polished concrete floor, warm linear lighting, dark wood and metal details, reflective car paint, high-end automotive lifestyle atmosphere, no visible logos
studios.wardrobe_prompt: luxury garage wardrobe: sharp urban luxury outfit, leather jacket, tailored coat, monochrome suit or premium casual, confident automotive editorial styling

studios.name: Мотогонки / pit lane
studios.description: Pit lane и мотоспорт: боксы, разметка, техника, динамичный свет и собранный racing editorial-образ.
studios.base_prompt: in a professional motorcycle racing pit lane with garage bays, race track markings, tools, matte bikes without logos, motion energy, cinematic paddock lighting, premium motorsport editorial atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: pit lane wardrobe: stylish motorsport-inspired outfit, racing jacket, black trousers, technical fabrics, boots, fully clothed editorial racing look, no brand logos

studios.name: Частный самолёт / бизнес-джет
studios.description: Интерьер бизнес-джета: светлая кожа, овальные окна, лакированные панели и приватная premium travel-атмосфера.
studios.base_prompt: inside a private business jet cabin with cream leather seats, oval airplane windows, polished wood panels, soft daylight, compact luxury travel interior, premium aviation lifestyle atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: private jet wardrobe: elegant travel business outfit, blazer, cashmere knit, tailored trousers, quiet luxury styling, polished but relaxed

studios.name: Аэропорт / VIP terminal
studios.description: VIP terminal аэропорта: lounge, панорамные окна, чемоданы, мягкая подсветка и образ премиального путешествия.
studios.base_prompt: inside a VIP airport terminal lounge with panoramic runway windows, cream lounge chairs, polished stone floor, discreet luggage, warm architectural lighting, premium travel atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: VIP airport wardrobe: refined travel outfit, blazer, coat, smart casual layers, stylish carry-on mood, comfortable luxury travel styling

studios.name: Rooftop с видом на город
studios.description: Городской rooftop: огни skyline, терраса, glass railings, вечерний воздух и статусная lifestyle-серия.
studios.base_prompt: on a luxury city rooftop terrace with skyline view, glass railings, outdoor lounge furniture, warm evening light, urban depth, high-end rooftop lifestyle atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: rooftop wardrobe: stylish evening city outfit, tailored blazer, cocktail smart casual, premium shoes, confident urban nightlife styling

studios.name: Ресторан fine dining
studios.description: Fine dining restaurant: белые скатерти, тёплый свет, сервировка, бар и элегантная вечерняя атмосфера.
studios.base_prompt: inside a fine dining restaurant with white tablecloths, elegant table settings, warm pendant lights, marble bar, velvet seating, refined evening hospitality atmosphere, no readable menus
studios.wardrobe_prompt: fine dining wardrobe: elegant dinner outfit, cocktail dress or dark suit, refined evening styling, polished restaurant atmosphere

studios.name: Гольф-клуб
studios.description: Гольф-клуб: зелёные поля, clubhouse, тележка, мягкий свет и аккуратный sport-luxury образ.
studios.base_prompt: at a premium golf club with green fairway, clubhouse architecture, golf cart, trimmed grass, soft daylight, open landscape, refined sport luxury atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: golf club wardrobe: elegant golf lifestyle outfit, polo, knit vest, tailored shorts or trousers, clean sneakers or loafers, refined country club styling

studios.name: Сад виллы / итальянская вилла
studios.description: Итальянская вилла: каменные арки, кипарисы, сад, терраса, солнечные стены и мягкий vacation editorial.
studios.base_prompt: in an Italian villa garden with stone arches, cypress trees, terracotta walls, terrace, sculptural greenery, warm Mediterranean daylight, elegant vacation editorial atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: Italian villa wardrobe: elegant Mediterranean outfit, linen suit, summer dress, silk scarf, soft neutral or rich natural colors, refined villa lifestyle styling

studios.name: Парижская улица / европейский квартал
studios.description: Европейская улица: кафе, каменные фасады, балконы, мягкий свет и спокойный Paris editorial-style.
studios.base_prompt: on a Parisian European street with stone facades, wrought iron balconies, small cafe tables, cobblestones, soft daylight, elegant urban European editorial atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: Paris street wardrobe: chic European outfit, trench coat, blazer, silk blouse, loafers, refined effortless city styling

studios.name: Токио ночью / неоновые улицы
studios.description: Ночной Токио: неон, мокрый асфальт, витрины, отражения и яркий cinematic street-fashion.
studios.base_prompt: on Tokyo neon night streets with glowing signs without readable text, wet pavement reflections, compact city alleys, colorful cinematic light, stylish urban night editorial atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: Tokyo neon wardrobe: modern street-fashion outfit, dark coat, technical jacket, layered monochrome with color accents, stylish night city look

studios.name: Нью-Йорк editorial street
studios.description: New York street editorial: лестницы, кирпич, такси-цвет, плотная городская перспектива и fashion-ритм.
studios.base_prompt: on a New York editorial street with brick buildings, fire escapes, urban crosswalk, muted yellow taxi-like color accents without logos, strong city perspective, fashion street photography atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: New York editorial wardrobe: bold city fashion outfit, oversized blazer, trench, denim, boots, confident editorial street style

studios.name: Музыкальная студия
studios.description: Атмосферная студия звукозаписи: акустические панели, микшерный пульт, микрофон, тёплый свет и creative portrait mood.
studios.base_prompt: in a premium music recording studio with acoustic wood panels, mixing console, studio microphone, warm lamps, glass vocal booth, cinematic creative portrait atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: music recording studio wardrobe: stylish creative outfit, leather jacket, relaxed blazer, dark denim, simple jewelry, confident artist or producer editorial styling

studios.name: Вилла Кипр
studios.description: Солнечная вилла на Кипре: белый камень, террасы, бассейн, пальмы, море и тёплый средиземноморский свет для лёгкой lifestyle-съёмки.
studios.base_prompt: at a sunny Cyprus Mediterranean villa with white limestone walls, open terraces, infinity pool, palm trees, linen curtains, stone floors, sea horizon, warm bright daylight, luxury resort villa atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: Cyprus villa wardrobe: elegant Mediterranean resort outfit, linen shirt, light trousers, summer dress, silk scarf, sandals or loafers, fully clothed sunny premium vacation styling

studios.name: Black Photo Studio
studios.description: Чёрная циклорама и минималистичная fashion-студия: сильный направленный свет, чистый фон, студийное оборудование и лаконичный editorial-образ.
studios.base_prompt: inside a black minimal fashion photo studio with seamless black cyclorama, matte dark floor, professional softboxes, spotlights, light stands, posing cube, clean uncluttered editorial portrait set, dramatic controlled studio lighting
studios.wardrobe_prompt: black photo studio wardrobe: minimal fashion editorial outfit, monochrome black or white styling, structured blazer, fitted trousers, leather or satin accents, no logos, fully clothed high-fashion look

studios.name: Fashion Boutique
studios.description: Премиальный бутик и concept store: рейлы с одеждой, зеркала, сумки, тёплый витринный свет и чистая fashion/editorial-атмосфера.
studios.base_prompt: inside a premium fashion boutique concept store with elegant clothing racks, curated outfits, full-length mirrors, marble display tables, handbags, warm display lighting, soft beige plaster walls, refined editorial retail atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: fashion boutique wardrobe: polished editorial fashion outfit, tailored coat, blazer, designer-inspired accessories without logos, elegant shoes, layered premium styling, fully clothed concept store look

studios.name: Марокканский riad
studios.description: Desert resort / марокканский riad: арки, плитка, внутренний дворик, фонтан, пальмы, фонари и тёплый luxury travel-свет.
studios.base_prompt: inside a luxury Moroccan riad desert resort courtyard with ornate arches, zellige tile, carved plaster, fountain pool, palm trees, lanterns, warm golden sunlight, lounge cushions, luxury travel editorial atmosphere
studios.wardrobe_prompt: Moroccan riad wardrobe: elegant resort fashion outfit, linen layers, silk scarf, light tailored separates or flowing dress, warm neutral tones, luxury travel styling, fully clothed
